revision.content:
Occaisonally we have hackathons! This is a list of former and upcoming hackathons we've had. These can be either formal sponsored events or other types of less formal hackathons.

== Instructables Summer Makerspace Contest ==
In the summer of 2016 we participated in the Instructables Makerspace Contest: [http://www.instructables.com/contest/Makerspace/ http://www.instructables.com/contest/Makerspace/]
This was a team-event to make the most instructables and most featured instructables. Various prizes were available depending on how successful a team was.

{| class="wikitable"
! Dates
|-
| 6-1-2016 through 8-31-2016
|}

* We won the section for "10 Featured Instructables" along with other spaces.
** Prizes included T-shirts for 5 members of our team and stickers
** We won a $200 gift code for Makeblock (maker oriented robotic kits) and a $50 gift code for 3D Hubs (a 3D printing service)
** We bought this [[Mini XY Laser Engraver]] using our Makeblock gift code!

==== All entries for this contest submitted by Bloominglabs members ====
All Bloominglabs entries including other contests can be seen [http://www.instructables.com/howto/Bloominglabs9189/ here].

* [http://www.instructables.com/id/Change-a-Mountain-Bike-Tube-Without-Tools/ Change-a-Mountain-Bike-Tube-Without-Tools]
* [http://www.instructables.com/id/Build-a-Weather-Station-Enclosure/ Build-a-Weather-Station-Enclosure]
* [http://www.instructables.com/id/STALKER-inspired-Pan-Pipes/ STALKER-inspired-Pan-Pipes]
* [http://www.instructables.com/id/Make-a-Handheld-InkJet-Printer-Print-on-ANY-Surfac/ Make-a-Handheld-InkJet-Printer-Print-on-ANY-Surface]

* [http://www.instructables.com/id/Mint-Tin-AVR-ProgrammerPrototyper/ Mint-Tin-AVR-ProgrammerPrototyper]
* [http://www.instructables.com/id/Hacking-a-Talking-Skeleton/ Hacking-a-Talking-Skeleton]
* [http://www.instructables.com/id/Everstream-USB-Keeps-the-Stream-Alive/ Everstream-USB-Keeps-the-Stream-Alive]
* [http://www.instructables.com/id/Low-Budget-Method-to-Mount-Antenna-Masts-to-a-Buil/ Low-Budget-Method-to-Mount-Antenna-Masts-to-a-Building]
* [http://www.instructables.com/id/The-Amazing-Gin-Pole-Lifter/ The-Amazing-Gin-Pole-Lifter]
* [http://www.instructables.com/id/Build-a-Killer-Plastic-Bag-Sealing-Station/ Build-a-Killer-Plastic-Bag-Sealing-Station]
* [http://www.instructables.com/id/Build-a-Weather-Station-Enclosure/ Build-a-Weather-Station-Enclosure]

* [http://www.instructables.com/id/How-to-Change-the-Crank-Sensor-in-Your-2001-Durang/ How-to-Change-the-Crank-Sensor-in-Your-2001-Durango]
* [http://www.instructables.com/id/Antenna-Mount-on-a-Durangocar-Hood/ Antenna-Mount-on-a-Durango/car-Hood]
